title: .NET 10 Modernization Audit
description: Audit codebase for problems and modernization opportunities. Report findings and auto-fix safe issues (naming, formatting, minor modernizations).

title: Audit AAXtoM4BConvertor
description:
## Modernization Audit Complete

### Fixes Applied (Safe Auto-fixes)
1. ✅ String interpolation: Replaced string concatenations with `""`
2. ✅ Pattern matching: `!= null` → `is not null`, `== null` → `is null`
3. ✅ `var` for local variables where type is obvious
4. ✅ `string.Empty` (lowercase) for consistency
5. ✅ Removed double semicolon typo
6. ✅ Removed redundant `this.` prefix
7. ✅ Added null-coalescing `?? string.Empty` for `Path.GetDirectoryName`
8. ✅ Added null guard: `if (matchingFile is not null && directory is not null)`

### Issues Requiring Manual Review
1. **Nullable reference warnings (15+)** - Deep null chains in `AddMetadataToM4A()`:
   - Lines 330-331: `aaxInfo?.format.tags.title` dereferences potentially null `tags`
   - Line 333: `ProcessTitleForComparison(titleString)` with possibly null input
   - Lines 345-354: Multiple dereferences inside `if (data is not null)` block
   - Line 169: `Regex.Replace(title, ...)` where `title` may be null
   - Line 173: `Path.Combine()` with potentially null `title`

2. **Async/await pattern** - Uses `Task.Wait()` instead of `async/await` (conscious design choice for console app)

3. **Method signatures** - Some methods take non-nullable parameters but may receive null

**Build Status:** ✅ Build succeeded with 40 warnings (pre-existing nullable reference warnings)

title: Audit AAXCtoM4BConvertor
description:
## Audit Summary: AAXCtoM4BConvertor.cs

### Issues Found & Fixes Applied (8 safe auto-fixes)

1. **Double semicolon** (line 176) → Fixed: `title;;` → `title;`
2. **String interpolation** (line 277) → Fixed: `"[" + args.Percent.ToString("D3") + "%]"` → `$"[{args.Percent:D3}%]"`
3. **String interpolation** (line 394-395) → Fixed: Exception messages now use `$"..."` instead of string concatenation
4. **String interpolation** (line 57) → Fixed: `"Processing " + Path.GetFileName(filePath)` → `$"Processing {Path.GetFileName(filePath)}"`
5. **Redundant newline** (line 46) → Fixed: Removed `\n` from `WriteLine` (newline is implicit)
6. **`String.Empty`** (line 109) → Fixed: Changed to lowercase `string.Empty` per conventions
7. **Pattern matching** (line 76) → Fixed: `intermediateFile == null` → `intermediateFile is null`
8. **Pattern matching** (line 295) → Fixed: `matchingFile != null` → `matchingFile is not null`

### Issues Requiring Manual Review (7 categories)

1. **Async/Await Pattern Violations** (HIGH PRIORITY)
   - Lines 91, 117, 207, 219, 269, 309: Uses `.Wait()` on async operations
   - `FFProbeAnalyzer.AnalyzeFile()` returns `Task<bool>` but called with `.Wait()` and `.Result`
   - **Recommendation**: Convert entire class to async/await pattern

2. **Null Reference Warnings** (HIGH PRIORITY - CS8602, CS8604)
   - Lines 65-66, 74, 98, 179, 183, 289, 330-346: Multiple null dereference warnings

3. **`this.` Qualifier** 
   - Lines 65-66, 242: Inconsistent use of `this.` prefix
   - **Recommendation**: Remove `this.` per project style

4. **Redundant `using` Statements**
   - Line 11: `SearchOption` alias unused

5. **Error Handling Gaps**
   - No try-catch around file I/O operations
   - No validation of voucher file existence

6. **Commented Dead Code**
   - Lines 128-132, 222, 225-226: Commented-out code

7. **Potential Performance** (line 378-379)
   - CleanTitle could use `ReadOnlySpan` if hot path

### Class Reference Status
- `FFProbeAnalyzer` class name is **correct** - no rename needed

title: Fix Critical Bugs and Add Tests
description: Fix 3 critical bugs from TODO.md and add xUnit test coverage

title: Create xUnit test project
description: Created Harmony.Tests xUnit test project with FluentAssertions and coverlet.collector. Added project reference to Harmony. Updated Harmony.sln to include the test project. Fixed main project to exclude test files. Updated both projects to target net10.0 to match installed runtime. Build and tests pass successfully.

title: Fix FFProbeAnalyzer always returns true
description: Fixed FFProbeAnalyzer.AnalyzeFile that always returned true. Removed malformed probe command with trailing quote, now uses FFmpeg.GetMediaInfo() properly and returns actual validation result. Build succeeded.

title: Fix NullReferenceException in AAXCtoM4BConvertor.GenerateCover
description: Fixed NullReferenceException in AAXCtoM4BConvertor.GenerateCover method. Added null guard for Path.GetDirectoryName() return value. When directory is null (malformed path), the method now safely falls through to FFmpeg extraction instead of crashing on Directory.GetFiles() with null argument. Build verified with 0 errors.

title: Add tests for critical fixes and core functionality
Fix Medium/Low Priority Issues
description: Fix code quality issues from TODO.md: redundant this., dead code, null patterns, magic numbers, documentation

title: Fix Program.cs code quality
description:
Successfully extracted SpinnerDelayMs constant (50ms) from magic numbers in Program.cs. Added two tests (SpinnerDelayMs_ShouldBePublicConstant, SpinnerDelayMs_ShouldBe50Milliseconds) to verify the constant value. 

Notes on other task items:
- LoopSleepMinutes: Already correctly implemented as TimeSpan.FromMinutes(5) on line 125
- MaxAuthorsBeforeVarious: Already extracted as public const (value 4) in AaxToM4BConvertor.cs and AaxcToM4BConvertor.cs where it's actually used - not needed in Program.cs
- string.Empty: No empty string literals found in Program.cs to replace

All 62 tests pass. Build succeeded with no errors.

title: Fix High Priority Issues
description: Fix remaining HIGH priority issues from TODO.md: duplicate FFmpeg logic, empty HandleParseError, null dereferences in metadata processing

title: Fix AAXtoM4BConvertor null dereference
description: Fixed null dereference in AAXtoM4BConvertor.cs AddMetadataToM4A method. Extracted title to local variable with null check before regex matching. Also fixed null-conditional chain on copyright. Build succeeded, all 69 tests pass.

title: Fix M4B Tag Population
description: Fix null reference risks and add consistent metadata handling for reliable Audiobookshelf imports

title: Fix AAXCtoM4BConvertor tags and add metadata.json
Comprehensive Test Coverage
description: Add unit tests for all untested code paths: Logger, ChapterConvertor, DTOs, and enhanced converter tests

title: Complete async/await migration for Harmony 2.0
description: Convert internal methods from .Wait() to proper async/await using Xabe.FFmpeg async APIs. Keep sync entry point wrapper. Update tests to async patterns.

title: Migrate AAXtoM4BConvertor to async
description: Convert AAXtoM4BConvertor.cs to use async/await patterns. Methods to migrate: Execute() → ExecuteAsync(), ProcessAaxFile() → ProcessAaxFileAsync(), ProcessToM4A() → ProcessToM4AAsync(), FallbackProcessToM4A() → FallbackProcessToM4AAsync(), GenerateCover() → GenerateCoverAsync(). Replace all .Wait() with await, .Result with await. Keep GetAaxInfo() and AddMetadataToM4A() sync (Process.WaitForExit and TagLib are sync). Use ConfigureAwait(false) for library calls.

title: Migrate Program.cs to async
description: Update Program.cs after converters are async. Convert RunOptions() → RunOptionsAsync() to call the new ExecuteAsync() methods. Keep Main() as sync entry point with .GetAwaiter().GetResult() wrapper for RunOptionsAsync(). Remove .GetAwaiter().GetResult() from internal calls (it should only be at the sync/async boundary in Main). Use ConfigureAwait(false) throughout.

title: Migrate AAXCtoM4BConvertor to async
description: Convert AAXCtoM4BConvertor.cs to use async/await patterns. Same migration as AAXtoM4BConvertor: Execute() → ExecuteAsync(), ProcessAaxcFile() → ProcessAaxcFileAsync(), ProcessToM4A() → ProcessToM4AAsync(), FallbackProcessToM4A() → FallbackProcessToM4AAsync(), GenerateCover() → GenerateCoverAsync(). Replace all .Wait() with await, .Result with await. Keep GetAaxcInfo() and AddMetadataToM4A() sync. Use ConfigureAwait(false) for library calls.

title: Update AAXtoM4BConvertorTests to async
description: Convert test methods in AAXtoM4BConvertorTests.cs to async Task. Update all test methods that call converter methods to use await. Use xUnit's async test support (async Task test methods). Keep FluentAssertions assertions. Ensure all tests pass with dotnet test.

title: Update AAXCtoM4BConvertorTests to async
description: Convert test methods in AAXCtoM4BConvertorTests.cs to async Task. Update all test methods that call converter methods to use await. Use xUnit's async test support. Keep FluentAssertions assertions. Ensure all tests pass with dotnet test.

title: Update FFProbeAnalyzerTests to async
description: Verified: FFProbeAnalyzerTests.cs already uses async Task pattern correctly. All 5 test methods are async Task and use await for AnalyzeFile() calls. Tests pass (5/5). No code changes required.

title: Update ProgramTests to async
description: Convert test methods in ProgramTests.cs to async Task. Update tests that test async functionality. Use xUnit's async test support. Keep FluentAssertions assertions. Ensure all tests pass.

title: Build and verify async migration
description: Run dotnet build to verify compilation. Run dotnet test to ensure all 211+ tests pass. Run dotnet format to ensure code style. Fix any compilation errors or test failures. Report final status.

title: Fix 11 nullable reference warnings
description: Fix 11 nullable reference type warnings (CS8604, CS8602) in AAXtoM4BConvertor.cs and AAXCtoM4BConvertor.cs to achieve clean build with /warnaserror

title: Add TUI Progress Tracking to Harmony
description: Add Spectre.Console-based TUI progress bars to Harmony to show file processing status and per-file conversion progress. MVP: run with CLI switches, show progress bars, no controls except Ctrl+C.

title: Test TUI with sample files
description: Verify the TUI displays correctly with multiple files, progress bars update, and Ctrl+C cancels gracefully

title: Add Spectre.Console NuGet package
description: Add Spectre.Console package reference to Harmony.csproj to enable rich console UI components

title: Create ProgressContextManager service
description: Create a new ProgressContextManager class that uses Spectre.Console's ProgressContext to manage overall progress display, showing current file number and total files, and providing access to progress bars for each conversion step

title: Add progress tracking to AaxToM4BConvertor
description: Modify AaxToM4BConvertor to accept and use a ProgressContext for showing per-file conversion progress (probing, converting, adding metadata, chapters, etc.)

title: Add progress tracking to AaxcToM4BConvertor
description: Modify AaxcToM4BConvertor to accept and use a ProgressContext for showing per-file conversion progress (similar to AaxToM4BConvertor)

title: Integrate TUI into Program.cs main loop
description: Update Program.cs to create ProgressContext and wrap the conversion execution in a Spectre.Console Progress display, showing overall file count progress

title: Add Ctrl+C cancellation support
description: Add graceful cancellation handling using CancellationToken that propagates to async operations when user presses Ctrl+C

title: Comprehensive Harmony Codebase Review & Test Coverage Analysis
description: Review entire Harmony codebase, identify improvements and gaps, ensure proper test coverage. NO CODE CHANGES beyond test additions - focus on analysis and recommendations only.

title: Review AAXtoM4BConvertor.cs - Code Quality & Test Coverage
description: Analyze AAXtoM4BConvertor.cs for code quality issues, maintainability concerns, missing error handling, and incomplete test coverage. Focus on identifying patterns that need testing: async methods, file operations, error paths, boundary conditions. DO NOT modify the source file - only analyze and document findings. Add tests where coverage is missing.

title: Review Supporting Classes - Logger, FFProbeAnalyzer, ChapterConvertor
description: Review Logger.cs, FFProbeAnalyzer.cs, ChapterConvertor.cs, and ProgressContextManager.cs for code quality, error handling, and test coverage. Identify missing test cases and potential improvements. DO NOT modify source files.

title: Review AAXCtoM4BConvertor.cs - Code Quality & Test Coverage
description: Analyze AAXCtoM4BConvertor.cs for code quality issues, maintainability concerns, missing error handling, and incomplete test coverage. Identify differences from AAXtoM4BConvertor and whether shared logic should be extracted. DO NOT modify the source file - only analyze and document findings. Add tests where coverage is missing.

title: Review Program.cs & CLI Architecture
description: Analyze Program.cs entry point, options parsing, and overall application architecture. Review command-line argument handling, main execution flow, cancellation handling, and logging setup. Identify architectural improvements and test gaps. DO NOT modify source files.

title: Review DTOs & Data Models - Testing & Validation
description: Review all DTO classes in the Dto/ folder (AaxInfoDto, AbsMetadata, AudibleLibraryDto, AudibleChaptersDto, AudibleVoucherDto). Check for proper null handling, validation, serialization edge cases. Ensure comprehensive test coverage. DO NOT modify source files.

title: Synthesize Review Findings & Create Recommendations Report
description: Consolidate all review findings into a comprehensive report. Prioritize recommendations by impact and effort. Identify common patterns across files that need attention. Create actionable next steps. This task depends on completion of all prior review tasks.

title: Fix Tests, Add Coverage, and Refactor Converters
description: Three-phase improvement: 1) Fix 2 failing Logger tests, 2) Create comprehensive tests for ProgressContextManager (0% coverage), 3) Extract base class to eliminate 90% code duplication between AAX and AAXC converters

title: Fix Failing LoggerTests - 2 failing tests
description: Fix the 2 failing Logger tests identified in test run. Tests: AdvanceSpinner_ShouldWriteEvenInQuietMode and Logger_QuietMode_ShouldSuppressWriteAndWriteLineButNotSpinner. Analyze the failures, fix the implementation or tests as needed, ensure all tests pass.

title: Create ProgressContextManager Tests - 0% coverage
description: Create comprehensive test file for ProgressContextManager.cs which currently has 0% test coverage on 181 lines of complex async/TUI code. Test: constructor validation, FormatBookTitle, CancellationToken propagation, Dispose pattern, progress increment accuracy. Create Harmony.Tests/ProgressContextManagerTests.cs with xUnit and FluentAssertions.

title: Refactor Converters - Extract Base Class for Deduplication
description: Extract AudiobookConverterBase abstract class to eliminate ~90% code duplication between AAXtoM4BConvertor and AAXCtoM4BConvertor. Shared methods: CleanTitle, CleanAuthor, CheckFolders, PrepareOutputDirectory, GenerateCoverAsync, AddMetadataToM4A. Keep only authentication differences in subclasses. Ensure all existing tests pass after refactoring.

title: Add Null Validation to ProcessTitleForComparison
description: Add null input validation to ProcessTitleForComparison method. Currently throws NullReferenceException on null input. Location: AudiobookConverterBase.cs line 345. Add null check and return empty string or throw ArgumentNullException.

title: Fix Critical Security and Reliability Issues
description: Fix 7 critical security and reliability issues identified in CODEBASE_REVIEW_REPORT.md: TOCTOU race conditions, command injection vulnerabilities, null validation gaps, parsing without validation, empty catch blocks, and race conditions. These must be fixed before production deployment.

title: Fix TOCTOU Race Conditions in File Operations
description: Fix TOCTOU (Time-of-Check-Time-of-Use) race conditions in file operations. Replace File.Exists checks with proper try-catch exception handling. Locations: AudiobookConverterBase.cs (lines 274-287 area). Use IOException catch blocks with specific error code handling.

title: Fix Command Injection in FFmpeg Arguments
description: Fix command injection vulnerabilities in FFmpeg argument construction. Replace string interpolation with argument arrays. Locations: AAXCtoM4BConvertor.cs lines 173-176, 291-296, 338-343. Ensure file paths with special characters cannot inject commands.

title: Fix uint.Parse Without Validation
description:
Fixed uint.Parse without validation in AudiobookConverterBase.cs.

Line 484-485: Changed from `uint.Parse(aaxInfo.format.tags.date)` to `uint.TryParse(aaxInfo.format.tags.date, out var year)` with proper null checks.

Old code: `tag.Year = uint.Parse(aaxInfo.format.tags.date);`
New code: `if (uint.TryParse(aaxInfo.format.tags.date, out var year)) tag.Year = year;`

This prevents FormatException on malformed date input and properly handles the case where date parsing fails.

title: Fix Empty Catch Block in FFProbeAnalyzer
description: Fix empty catch block in FFProbeAnalyzer that silently swallows all exceptions. Currently makes debugging impossible. Location: FFProbeAnalyzer.cs line 42. Add proper logging or rethrow with context.

title: Fix Race Conditions in ProgressContextManager
description: Fix race conditions in ProgressContextManager. CancellationToken not properly used in RunAsync, _progressTask accessed across async boundaries without synchronization. Location: ProgressContextManager.cs lines 45-90. Add proper async synchronization.

title: Fix Spectre.Console Blocking Issues
description: Address Spectre.Console blocking issues that make application unresponsive during long operations. Location: ProgressContextManager.cs. Review async usage and ensure proper thread handling.
